code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
sel = model.selection.to_a
if sel.empty?
  { 'ok' => false, 'error' => 'no objects selected' }
else
  model.start_operation('AWARE move selected', true)
  t = Geom::Transformation.translation(Geom::Vector3d.new(100.mm, 100.mm, 0))
  model.entities.transform_entities(t, sel)
  model.commit_operation
  { 'ok' => true, 'moved' => sel.length, 'dx_mm' => 100, 'dy_mm' => 100 }
end
